turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
About Super Services LLC

Welcome to Super Services LLC, where our passion for technical and outdoor handyman services meets the dedication to serving our neighbors in the beautiful North Idaho.

Super Services LLC is a trusted small business that has been rooted in the community for generations. Our family has been servicing the North Idaho area for a long time, forging long-lasting relationships through our unwavering commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

As a tight-knit and locally-owned business, we are proud of our reputation for delivering top-notch services with a personal touch. We understand the importance of turning your house into a home or ensuring your business runs smoothly, and our team of experienced professionals is committed to providing the highest quality work in a timely and efficient manner.

Some of the services we offer include:

- Technical assistance and support
- Outdoor and indoor maintenance and repairs
- Landscaping and lawn care
- Seasonal cleanups
- Tree and shrub care
- Gutter cleaning and maintenance
- Custom carpentry and woodworking
- And much more!

At Super Services LLC, we take pride in our communication and transparency. Our clients can rest easy knowing that we provide pictures, videos, and detailed documentation of every step of every job, ensuring you are never left guessing what the status of your project is. 

We believe in delivering exceptional value to our clients – by offering competitively priced services without compromising the quality of our workmanship. Our long-standing presence in the North Idaho community speaks to our dedication in providing complete customer satisfaction, every time.

From one-time jobs to ongoing property management, Super Services LLC is the go-to solution for all your technical and outdoor handyman needs in North Idaho. We look forward to working with you and showing you what sets our family-owned business apart from the rest. Contact us today to schedule a consultation or for more information about the services we offer. 

Thank you for considering Super Services LLC as your local partner in building, maintaining, and improving the spaces that matter most to you.

Provide details about all the services

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Services

At Super Services LLC, we are proud to offer a wide range of technical, outdoor, and property management services to both residential and commercial clients in the North Idaho area. Our talented team of experts is committed to delivering top-quality workmanship, ensuring every project is completed with the same attention to detail and dedication.

Technical Services:

1. Security Camera Installation and Troubleshooting: We offer professional installation and servicing of security camera systems, ensuring your property is always protected and monitored. Our experts are proficient in preventing and resolving any issues that may arise, allowing you to have peace of mind.

2. Starlink Installation: As an authorized Starlink installer, we can set up and configure your high-speed satellite internet connection, providing you with reliable and fast internet access, no matter your location.

3. Network Setup: We specialize in designing, implementing, and maintaining both wired and wireless networks for homes and businesses. Whether you need a simple home network or a more complex enterprise solution, our team is here to help.

4. Smart Home Setup: Allow us to transform your home into a smart home with a customized automation system. We can install and configure devices such as smart thermostats, lighting, door locks, and more to enhance your comfort, convenience, and security.

Outdoor Services:

1. Decking and Deck Maintenance: We provide professional deck design, construction, and maintenance services, ensuring your outdoor space is both functional and visually appealing. From power washing and sealing to repairs and refinishing, your deck will always be in top condition with our help.

2. Power Washing: Our power washing services help you maintain the appearance and longevity of your property, removing dirt, mold, and mildew from your home's exterior, driveway, sidewalks, and more.

3. Yard Maintenance: We offer various yard maintenance services, including lawn care, tree and shrub trimming, leaf removal, and seasonal cleanups, ensuring your property always looks its best.

4. Roof Maintenance: We provide preventative roof maintenance services, including cleaning, inspection, and minor repairs, helping you avoid costly damage and extend the life of your roof.

Property Management and Consulting:

1. Property Management/Property Watch Services: We offer property management and property watch services for both residential and commercial properties. Our team ensures that your property is well-maintained, secure, and in compliance with any local regulations.

2. Project Management: We can oversee and manage all aspects of your construction or renovation project, ensuring it is completed on time, on budget, and to your exact specifications.

3. Construction Consulting: Our experienced professionals can provide valuable construction consulting services, advising you on the best materials, project planning, and cost-saving strategies for your specific project.

At Super Services LLC, our comprehensive range of services makes us the go-to choice for clients seeking the highest quality workmanship and unmatched customer service. If you're in need of any of these services or simply need guidance on an upcoming project, please don't hesitate to contact us to find out how we can help you.
